name: forgecode-agent
description: A hardened, local-first VS Code coding agent that exposes LM Studio models in the model picker, chat, tools, and inline completions.

forgeCode.baseUrl.markdownDescription: OpenAI-compatible local endpoint. LM Studio uses `http://127.0.0.1:1234/v1` by default.

forgeCode.allowRemoteEndpoints.markdownDescription: Allow non-localhost model endpoints. When enabled, remote endpoints must use `https`.

forgeCode.allowCommandExecution.markdownDescription: Allow the agent to run shell commands after an explicit confirmation prompt. Disabled by default.

forgeCode.defaultChatModel.markdownDescription: Preferred chat model ID. Leave blank to use the first discovered model.

forgeCode.defaultCompletionModel.markdownDescription: Preferred inline completion model ID. Falls back to the chat model when blank.

forgeCode.discoveredModels.markdownDescription: Fallback model IDs used when model discovery fails.

forgeCode.temperature.markdownDescription: Default temperature used for chat and inline completions.

forgeCode.maxInputTokens.markdownDescription: Declared maximum prompt budget for discovered local models.

forgeCode.maxOutputTokens.markdownDescription: Declared maximum output budget for discovered local models.

forgeCode.maxContextCharacters.markdownDescription: Maximum workspace context characters injected into the agent prompt.

forgeCode.maxWorkspaceFiles.markdownDescription: Maximum number of workspace files included in the context snapshot.

forgeCode.maxToolRounds.markdownDescription: Maximum number of tool-calling rounds allowed for a single chat request.

forgeCode.maxReadFileBytes.markdownDescription: Maximum file size that read and edit tools will load into the model context.

forgeCode.maxSearchFileBytes.markdownDescription: Maximum file size that search tools will scan before skipping a file.

forgeCode.maxCommandOutputCharacters.markdownDescription: Maximum shell output characters returned to the agent after a command completes.

forgeCode.inlineCompletions.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable inline code completions powered by the local endpoint.

forgeCode.inlineCompletions.maxPrefixCha.markdownDescription: Maximum prefix characters sent to the completion model.

forgeCode.inlineCompletions.maxSuffixCha.markdownDescription: Maximum suffix characters sent to the completion model.

forgeCode.inlineCompletions.minPromptCha.markdownDescription: Minimum characters before automatic inline completions are requested.

chatParticipants.name: local
chatParticipants.description: A local-first coding agent backed by LM Studio or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Plan a change with read-only tools

commands.name: implement
commands.description: Implement a change using read, write, and terminal tools

commands.name: review
commands.description: Review code for bugs, regressions, and missing tests

languageModelTools.name: forgecode-agent-list-workspace-files
languageModelTools.description: List workspace files, optionally filtered by a glob pattern.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List files in the current workspace, optionally narrowed by a glob pattern.

languageModelTools.name: forgecode-agent-search-workspace
languageModelTools.description: Search workspace text using a plain-text or regular expression query.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search text content across workspace files using a string or regular expression.

languageModelTools.name: forgecode-agent-read-file
languageModelTools.description: Read a UTF-8 text file from the workspace with optional line bounds.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read a text file from the workspace with optional line bounds.

languageModelTools.name: forgecode-agent-write-file
languageModelTools.description: Create or overwrite a UTF-8 text file inside the workspace.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Create or overwrite a text file inside the current workspace.

languageModelTools.name: forgecode-agent-replace-in-file
languageModelTools.description: Replace a specific string in a UTF-8 workspace file.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Replace an exact text match in a workspace file.

languageModelTools.name: forgecode-agent-run-terminal-command
languageModelTools.description: Run a shell command inside the current workspace and capture stdout and stderr.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run a shell command in the current workspace after explicit user confirmation.
